result:
Build is fully green (`redis-server`, `redis-cli`, `redis-benchmark`, and test modules all link successfully with no warnings/errors).

Summary of changes:
- `src/db.c:384` — renamed `lookupKeyReadOrReply(client *c, robj *key, robj *reply)` to `lookupKeyReadOrReplyEx(robj *key, client *c, robj *reply)`, same body/behavior.
- `src/server.h:4054` — updated the declaration to match.
- Migrated all 36 call sites (t_array.c, t_string.c, t_hash.c, geo.c, bitops.c, t_list.c, t_set.c, t_stream.c, t_zset.c) to the new function with swapped argument order.
- Verified no occurrences of the old name remain anywhere in `.c`/`.h` files.
